历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 10665→12622→15785→19446→25122, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 12460 in the past 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 25122, a further backward shift of about 5676 compared to 2024, with an accelerating pace; the university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Jiangxi was 53 in 2021, 71 in 2022, 77 in 2023, 95 in 2024, and 113 in 2025, expanding year by year; in 2026, the physics category plan is 112, and the medical category (belonging to the physics group) is 25, totaling 137, an expansion of about 21.2% compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion that intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; the Soft Science main ranking from 2021 to 2026 was 86→88→87→86→88→92, with a slight decline in recent years but overall stable at the upper-middle level; during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly due to a public controversy where a professor from the School of Literature publicly humiliated a student seeking help; Douyin popularity ranking is 100th, rated as average, with low short video exposure; no obvious enrollment gaps were recorded; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, only Foreign Language and Literature received an A-, with a limited number of A-class disciplines, which has a limited pull effect on science major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of teacher training/education majors shows a differentiated wait-and-see trend; the popularity of computer, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering and other science and engineering majors is hot to very hot, attracting some science candidates; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Jiangxi general college entrance examination is about 474,900, a slight increase from 2025 (history category + physics category total about 472,480), with an estimated physics category of about 267,800, slightly intensifying competition; the physics category undergraduate batch score dropped from 448 in 2024 to 429 in 2025, a significant decrease, reflecting overall difficulty or score line adjustments; Hunan Normal University is located in Changsha, Hunan Province, adjacent to Jiangxi Province, with moderate cross-province application preference; the university's enrollment proportion in Jiangxi has been rising in recent years, at an upper-middle level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the continuous backward trend of historical rankings and the intensifying effect of the large enrollment expansion (about 21.2%) in 2026 on competition, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for science (physics category) in 2026 will be about 28123, with a range of 27623–28623.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 1801 → 2175 → 2234 → 5167 → 3508. In 2024, due to the reform of the college entrance examination model (from arts/science division to 3+1+2), the ranking significantly dropped to 5167, but rebounded notably to 3508 in 2025, showing considerable fluctuation. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 3508. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Jiangxi Province was 47 in 2021, 61 in 2022, 57 in 2023, 63 in 2024, and 80 in 2025, showing an expansion trend. The 2026 history category plan is 86, an increase of about 7.5% compared to 2025, a moderate expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking on the Soft Science main list has been stable in the 86–92 range in recent years, considered upper-middle level. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation was slightly negative, mainly due to a public controversy where a professor from the School of Literature publicly humiliated a student seeking help, which may have a certain negative impact on the application psychology for liberal arts majors. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 100th, rated as average. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Foreign Language and Literature was rated A-, the only A-class discipline of the university, providing some support for liberal arts language majors. Education, Chinese Language and Literature, etc., did not receive A-class ratings.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of teacher training/education majors shows a differentiated and wait-and-see trend. Law is relatively hot but highly competitive. Chinese Language/Literature majors are recommended as hot. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Jiangxi Province general college entrance examination is approximately 474,900. Estimated by historical proportion, the history category is about 207,100, basically unchanged from 2025 (206,055). The history category undergraduate batch line rose from 463 in 2024 to 486 in 2025, a significant increase, reflecting intensified competition. Hunan Normal University is located in Changsha City, Hunan Province, adjacent to Jiangxi Province, with moderate cross-province application preference. The university's enrollment proportion in Jiangxi Province has been rising in recent years, at an upper-middle level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on historical ranking fluctuations (significant rebound in 2025 after the 2024 reform impact) and the moderate enrollment expansion in 2026 (about 7.5%), it is predicted that the minimum ranking for liberal arts (history category) in 2026 will be approximately 3716, with a range of 3216–4216.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, you can focus on reaching for Chinese Language and Literature (Teacher Training) and Law. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range, it is recommended to prioritize practical majors like Accounting and Finance from Tier 2, and pair them with Tier 3 majors for a safe backup.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 湖南师范大学位于湖南省长沙市，是国家211工程重点建设高校、双一流建设高校，虽以师范为特色，但其医学院（咸嘉湖校区）在医学领域具备一定办学实力，临床医学等专业 在省内具有较高认可度。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业在全国范围内持续保持高报考热度，临床医学尤为突出。湖南师范大学医学类在江西省招生规模较小（2026年仅25人），且2026年取消了医学检验技术和护理学（物 理类）的招生，进一步收窄了专业选择面，可能加剧竞争。长沙作为省会城市，对江西考生有一定地理吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合供需弹性模型与历年位次趋势，预测2026年湖南师范大学在江西省医学类最低录取位次约为22962名，较2025年小幅上升（更难进），波动区间预计在22503至23421名之间。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: Hunan Normal University offers independent enrollment in medicine in Jiangxi Province. From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings were 10665, 12236, 15785, 26345, and 23925 respectively, showing a fluctuating pattern of first rising, then falling, then rising again. In 2021, the plan was 9 students, sharply dropping to 2 in 2022, rebounding to 12 in 2023, significantly expanding to 33 in 2024, and reducing to 27 in 2025. The 2026 plan further decreases to 25 students (a reduction of about 7.4%), including 16 in Clinical Medicine, 5 in Pharmacy, and 4 in Preventive Medicine, with Medical Laboratory Technology and Nursing (Physics category) not included in the 2026 plan. Under the trend of enrollment reduction, the ranking is expected to continue a slight increase.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hunan Normal University is located in Changsha City, Hunan Province. It is a key national university under the 211 Project and a Double First-Class construction university. Although it is characterized by teacher training, its Medical School (Xianjiahu Campus) has certain strength in the medical field, and majors such as Clinical Medicine have high recognition within the province.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors continue to maintain high application enthusiasm nationwide, with Clinical Medicine being particularly prominent. The enrollment scale of Hunan Normal University's medical programs in Jiangxi Province is small (only 25 students in 2026), and the cancellation of Medical Laboratory Technology and Nursing (Physics category) in 2026 further narrows the range of major choices, potentially intensifying competition. Changsha, as a provincial capital, has certain geographical appeal to Jiangxi candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the supply-demand elasticity model and historical ranking trends, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Hunan Normal University's medical programs in Jiangxi Province in 2026 will be approximately 22962, a slight increase (harder to enter) compared to 2025, with a fluctuation range expected between 22503 and 23421.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Pharmacy as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 Clinical Medicine as a stretch, and use Tier 3 Preventive Medicine as a safety option.
